title: Glowing Trim Ultimate
description: Glowing Trim Armor, Elytra, Totem, Shield, Sword, Trident, Mace, Bow, Crossbow and Tools. with 18 trims designs and 13+3 colors, all version supported , Just re-name it.
body:
✨ Glowing Trim Ultimate Pack

Hello everyone! 👋
Back with a brand new Minecraft texture pack!

This is the ultimate combination of all Glowing Trim series packs:

• Glowing Trim Armors
• Glowing Trim Elytra
• Glowing Trim Weapons & Tools
• Glowing Trim Totem
• Glowing Trim Shield

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🔥 Overview

Introducing the Glowing Trim Ultimate Pack — a stylish texture pack that adds emissive glowing trims to 
your armor, elytra, shield, totem, weapons, and tools, 
allowing you to customize your gear and stand out with unique combinations.

✔ Works with or without shaders
✔ Supports all shader types (low-end to high-end)
✔ Smooth performance and multiplayer-friendly

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🔥 Features

✨ Emissive (glowing) trim effects
🎨 13 base colors + 3 Netherite-exclusive colors
🛡️ 18 unique trim designs
🔧 Easy activation via item renaming
💡 Works with or without shaders
⚡ Mix & match colors and designs

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

📌 Important Information

✔ OptiFine is required
✔ Uses Custom Item Textures (CIT)
✔ Effects apply to all supported items
✔ Simply rename items to activate designs

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

⚔️ Supported Items

Armor:-
Iron, Copper, Gold, Diamond: [13x18x4x4]=3744
Netherite: [16x18x4]=1152

Weapons:-
Mace: [16x18x1]=288
Trident: [16x1x1]=16
Bow: [16x1x1]=16
Crossbow: [16x1x1]=16

Spear:-
(Iron → Diamond): [13x18x4]=936
(Netherite): [16x18x1]=288

Swords:-
(Iron → Diamond): [13x18x4]=936
(Netherite): [16x18x1]=288

Tools:-
Hoe, Shovel, Pickaxe, Axe
(Iron → Diamond): [13x1x4x4]=208
(Netherite): [16x1x4x1]=64

Other Equipment:-
Elytra: [16x18x1]=288
Shield: [16x18x1]=288
Totem of Undying: [16x18x1]=288

Total Combination:-
[3774x1152x288x16x16x16x936x288x936x288x208x64x288x288x288] 
=118,512,526,272,794,925,750,373,169,070,342,144 
= 1.185 × 10³⁵ (approx)
= 118.51 decillion (approx)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎨 Color System
🌈 Base Colors (13)

| Color Name        | Code |
| ----------------- | ---- |
| Amethyst          | a    |
| Copper            | c    |
| Cherry            | ch   |
| Diamond           | d    |
| Emerald           | e    |
| Gold              | g    |
| Iron              | i    |
| Lapis             | l    |
| Netherite         | n    |
| Quartz            | q    |
| Redstone          | r    |
| Resin             | rs   |
| Prismarine        | p    |

🔥Netherite Exclusive (+3)

| Gilded Blackstone | gb   |
| Magma             | m    |
| Sculk             | s    |

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🛡️Trim Designs

| Design    | Code |
| --------- | ---- |
| Bolt      | 1    |
| Coast     | 2    |
| Dune      | 3    |
| Eye       | 4    |
| Flow      | 5    |
| Host      | 6    |
| Raiser    | 7    |
| Rib       | 8    |
| Sentry    | 9    |
| Shaper    | 10   |
| Silence   | 11   |
| Snout     | 12   |
| Spire     | 13   |
| Tide      | 14   |
| Vex       | 15   |
| Ward      | 16   |
| Wayfinder | 17   |
| Wild      | 18   |

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

⚙️ How to Use

Rename your item using:
[Color Code] + [Design Code]

Examples:
r14 , a10 , l6 , g7 , c4 , d16 , l2 , n9 , i3 , q12, ch18 , rs17, p15.

🔥 Netherite Only
 Examples:
m5, gb6, s10

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

📌 Items with fixed designs (no trim variations):

(Trident, Bow, Crossbow, Tools)
Use color code only:
Examples:
r , a , l , g , c , d , l , n , i , q , ch , rs, p.

🔥 Netherite Only
 Examples: 
m , gb , s

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

✨ Changes Applied

•After applying the pack:

1]Armors Appearance (Iron → Netherite)
2]Elytra Appearance
3]Shield Appearance
4]Totem Appearance
5]Spear models (1.21.11+)
6]Mace models (1.21+)
7]Trident, Bow, Crossbow
8]All Swords (Iron → Netherite)
9]All Tools (Iron → Netherite)
10]🆕 Copper weapons (1.21.9+)
11]GUI elements

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

⚠️ OptiFine Settings Required

Make sure these options are enabled:
✔ Emissive Textures
✔ Custom Items

Otherwise, the pack may not work properly.
Without OptiFine, the glowing (emissive) effect may not work, or the entire pack may fail.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🔧 Alternative Mods

Fabric Mods-
•EMF (Entity Model Features)
•ETF (Entity Texture Features)
•Continuity
•CIT Resewn
•Indium

Forge Mods-
•EMF (Entity Model Features)
•ETF (Entity Texture Features)
•Connectedness
•Fusion (Connected Textures)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

❗ Troubleshooting

🔄 Reload resource packs if it stops working
⚙️ Check OptiFine version compatibility
📦 Ensure proper installation

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🌍 Compatibility
✔ Singleplayer & Multiplayer
✔ Versions: 1.16 → Latest
✔ Separate files per version

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎉 Final Note

Upgrade your gear with Glowing Trim Ultimate and stand out with your own unique style.

Thanks for downloading ❤️
